prompt: Run payroll for Daniel Smith (daniel.smith@example.org) for this month. The base salary is 54850 NOK. Add a one-time bonus of 6800 NOK on top of the base salary. If the salary API is unavailable, you can use manual vouchers on salary accounts (5000-series) to record the payroll expense.

body.prompt: Run payroll for Daniel Smith (daniel.smith@example.org) for this month. The base salary is 54850 NOK. Add a one-time bonus of 6800 NOK on top of the base salary. If the salary API is unavailable, you can use manual vouchers on salary accounts (5000-series) to record the payroll expense.
